zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry of Essex於大約1120年出生在英國艾可雷利時，他的父親Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh57歲，母親Gunnora of Essex26歲。他和Cecely De Valognes至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他於1156年被列為he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. 。他去世於大約1170年在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry of Essex于大约1120年出生在英国艾可雷利时，他的父亲Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh57岁，母亲Gunnora of Essex26岁。他和Cecely De Valognes至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他于1156年被列为he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. 。他去世于大约1170年在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Essex
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Essex, whose name is from Old English ēast ‘east’ + Seaxe ‘Saxons’. In England, the surname is now particularly common in Birmingham.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry of Essex was born about 1120, in Rayleigh, Essex, England, his father, Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh, was 57 and his mother, Gunnora of Essex, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Cecely De Valognes. In 1156, his occupation is listed as he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. . He died about 1170, in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry of Essex est né environ 1120, à Rayleigh, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Gunnora of Essex, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Cecely De Valognes. En 1156, sa profession de son indiquée est he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. . Il est décédé environ 1170, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry of Essex um 1120 in Rayleigh, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh 57 und seine Mutter Gunnora of Essex 26. Er hatte mit Cecely De Valognes mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1156 ist sein Beruf als he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable.  aufgeführt. Er starb um 1170 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry of Essex è nato il circa 1120 nel Rayleigh, Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Gunnora of Essex, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Cecely De Valognes. Nel 1156, la sua occupazione è indicata come he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. . Morì circa 1170, nel Reading, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Reading, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry of Essexが約1120年にイギリスエセックスレイレイグで生まれた時，父Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleighは57歳，母Gunnora of Essexは26歳であった。彼はCecely De Valognesとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1156年，職業はhe served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. と記録されている。彼は約1170年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry of Essex(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 에세스 라일리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Gunnora of Essex(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Cecely De Valognes(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1156년, 그의 직업은 he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. 이었다. 그는 대략 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry of Essex nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Gunnora of Essex, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Cecely De Valognes. Em 1156, sua profissão aparece como he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. . Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1170, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry of Essex родился около 1120 г. в местности реилиг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Gunnora of Essex, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Cecely De Valognes. В 1156 году он работал по профессии he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. . Он умер около 1170 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry of Essex nació aproximadamente 1120, en Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Gunnora of Essex, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Cecely De Valognes. En 1156, su ocupación registrada era he served king henry ii as sheriff of bedfordshire and buckinghamshire and as a justiciar, as well as being his constable. . Murió aproximadamente 1170, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
